\documentclass[10pt,a4paper,ragged2e,withhyper]{altacv}

% Page layout
\geometry{left=1.25cm,right=1.25cm,top=1.5cm,bottom=1.5cm,columnsep=1.2cm}

% Fonts
\usepackage{paracol}
\usepackage[rm]{roboto}
\usepackage[defaultsans]{lato}
\renewcommand{\familydefault}{\sfdefault}

% Colors - Academic navy theme
\definecolor{SlateGrey}{HTML}{2E2E2E}
\definecolor{LightGrey}{HTML}{666666}
\definecolor{PrimaryColor}{HTML}{001F5B}    % Navy blue
\definecolor{SecondaryColor}{HTML}{0063B2}  % Bright blue
\definecolor{AccentColor}{HTML}{D4AF37}     % Gold accent

\colorlet{name}{PrimaryColor}
\colorlet{tagline}{SecondaryColor}
\colorlet{heading}{PrimaryColor}
\colorlet{headingrule}{AccentColor}
\colorlet{subheading}{SecondaryColor}
\colorlet{accent}{SecondaryColor}
\colorlet{emphasis}{SlateGrey}
\colorlet{body}{LightGrey}

% Bullet style
\renewcommand{\cvItemMarker}{{\small\textbullet}}
\renewcommand{\cvRatingMarker}{\faCircle}

% Bibliography
\usepackage{natbib}
\usepackage{bibtopic}
\bibliographystyle{plain}
